title: NetworkManager-libreswan bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.2.29-1]
- Upgrade to 1.2.29
- Fix error on duplicate key 'phase2alg'. (RHEL-131232)
- Fix import connection with RSA key. (RHEL-127865)
full_text:
[1.2.29-1]
- Upgrade to 1.2.29
- Fix error on duplicate key 'phase2alg'. (RHEL-131232)
- Fix import connection with RSA key. (RHEL-127865)
